executive_summary.main_recommendation: Pain point first: monthly AI spend is rising, from 201208.89 USD in 2024-10 to 204234.67 USD in 2025-03, up 1.5% over the period, with increases in 5 of 5 month-to-month periods and a peak in 2025-03 at 204234.67 USD. This means spend is not self-correcting, so the fastest CFO action is to control the clear waste bucket: Baptiste Bernard, Sara Mercier, Theo Girard, and Clara Chevalier all use more tokens than the team median while delivering weak story points per token; tokens per story point means how many tokens were spent to deliver one story point, and lower is better. Cap usage and review prompt logs for Baptiste Bernard first, then Sara Mercier and Theo Girard, because their tokens per story point are far above the team median and their tickets resolved and completion time do not justify the cost; Clara Chevalier should also be retrained before any budget increase. The second action is to replicate what works: Leila Park, Zoe Laurent, Hugo Dubois, Victor Durand, and Remy Dupuis convert tokens into delivery well, with much lower tokens per story point or higher story points per million tokens than the team median; recognize them and have them coach peers on smaller context, prompt discipline, and task selection. The third pain point is under-adoption with low delivery: Nadia Fernandez, Pierre Okafor, Simon Martin, and Jade Faure all sit below the median on both tokens_used and story_points, so budget cuts are less likely to help than adoption coaching; for this group, run targeted enablement and watch whether story_points and tickets_resolved improve next month. Overall, AI spend looks mixed rather than fully wasteful: there is enough strong usage to justify the program, but rising spend should be contained by reducing the overspender group and scaling the workflows of the efficient users.

employee_metrics.name: Alix Mbaye
employee_metrics.recommendation: Alix Mbaye is a benchmark: top 25% story point delivery (rank #10/40, P78) and top 25% efficiency (rank #10/40, P78), using 12396825 tokens per story point versus a team median of 20295238. Usage is top 65% token usage (rank #26/40, P38) (-17.8% vs median), but delivery is +37.7% vs median and efficiency is +63.6% vs median. Delivery context: 10 tickets resolved versus a team median of 6, 2.3 days average completion time versus 2.35 days median, 3 bugs closed, 9 merge requests, and 15024 lines of code. Recognize this person as a top AI user and have them coach others on token discipline.

employee_metrics.name: Leila Park
employee_metrics.recommendation: Leila Park is a model to copy: she used only 41444444 tokens and still delivered 42 story points, or 986772 tokens per story point versus the team median of 20295238. She also resolved 7 tickets, finished work in 2 days versus the 2.35 day median, and produced 10 merge requests. Praise this behavior and have her mentor peers on how she keeps context small and prompts focused. Next-month KPI to watch: story points per million tokens.
